title: Define n8n no-authority automation contract
goal: Define n8n as a bounded notification/proposal automation layer for GitHub, Bureau, Grabowski and Leitstand events without giving it queue, merge, deploy, host or secret authority.

acceptance.assertion: n8n cannot mutate Bureau queue truth, create or close tasks as authoritative state, merge PRs, deploy services, restart services or execute privileged host commands.
Allowed outputs are notifications, proposal artifacts, links and human-review packets only.
Credential storage, webhook secrets and log redaction are documented before any workflow receives real tokens.
The first n8n workflow is a dry-run read-only event mirror with no outbound mutation except a local artifact or explicit test notification.

metadata.source_request: grafana, n8n, bitwarden ins visier nehmen
